3151920.name: Vortex: Hoverdrome
3151920.description: Vortex: Hoverdrome is an arena shooter with up to 4 players at one time, all trying to capture the Proten, and get it to the extraction point to score a goal. You are driving a hoverbike that has afterburner, and you can pick up power ups like mines, and guided missiles to help you win the day. Protens will fall from the sky to be collected, and you must battle the other players in the arena avoiding lava and other obstacles in the quest to achieve the highest score in a 4 minute matches. An arena shooter like none other, we hope to see you in the Hoverdrome.
3151920.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
